channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lando Norris takes pole for season-ending Abu Dhabi GP, Hamilton 18th in Mercedes farewell
item.description: ABU DHABI, United Arab Emirates (AP) — Lando Norris took pole position for the last Formula 1 race of the season Saturday alongside teammate Oscar Piastri to put McLaren on the verge of a first constructors' title in 26 years. Norris' last lap put him .
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Everton vs. Liverpool postponed because of Storm Darragh. Other Premier League games remain on
item.description: LIVERPOOL, England (AP) — The Merseyside derby between Everton and Liverpool was postponed on Saturday because of Storm Darragh, which brought dangerous winds and heavy rain to the west coast. The Premier League match was due to kick off at 12.30 p.m. U.K.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: It’s not too late to learn how to ski or snowboard
item.description: Ski school can help adults master the skills they need, even if they've never been on the snow before.
item.dc:creator: R Scott Rappold, The Mercury News

item.title: No doubt about it: Moreau Catholic rolls past Leland for NorCal 7-AA title
item.description: 'It's great for the city of Hayward,' Moreau coach says after his team advances to 7-AA state championship game.
item.dc:creator: Glenn Reeves, The Mercury News

item.title: Boise State wins Mountain West championship as first expanded CFP bracket begins to take shape
item.description: Boise State won the Mountain West Conference title Friday night and earned their spot in the sport’s first 12-team playoff with a 21-7 victory over UNLV.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: No. 10 Boise State grabs CFP spot, beating No. 19 UNLV 21-7 in Mountain West championship
item.description: Ashton Jeanty ran for 209 yards and a touchdown and No. 10 Boise State earned a College Football Playoff spot, beating No. 19 UNLV 21-7 on Friday night for its second straight Mountain West title.
item.dc:creator: Jason Chatraw, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: No. 24 Army wins AAC championship in first attempt as Daily runs for 4 TDs in 35-14 win over Tulane
item.description: Bryson Daily rushed for four touchdowns to tie the American Athletic Conference championship game record, and No. 24 Army completed a perfect first season in the league by beating Tulane 35-14.
item.dc:creator: Brian Mahoney, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: School district mired in transgender athlete controversy tells critics to blame lawmakers in CA and DC
item.description: Martin Luther King Jr. High School addressed an ongoing controversy over a transgender athlete and shifted blame to California state government and the federal government.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former Cy Young winner Shane Bieber returning to Cleveland Guardians on 1-year deal, AP source says
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Shane Bieber is returning to the Cleveland Guardians after making just two starts and undergoing Tommy John surgery last season, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pennsylvania GOP leaders will reintroduce bill to restrict transgender athletes in girls, women's sports
item.description: Republican leaders in Pennsylvania are moving once again to attempt to restrict transgender athletes from competing against biological females in sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL ends investigation into sexual assault allegations against Browns QB Deshaun Watson
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — The NFL has closed an investigation into sexual assault allegations against Cleveland Browns quarterback Deshaun Watson, who is ending the season on injured reserve for the second year in a row.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets take on the Blackhawks Saturday following overtime win
item.description: Winnipeg Jets (19-8, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (8-16-2, in the Central Division) Chicago; Saturday, 4 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Winnipeg Jets visit the Chicago Blackhawks after the Jets defeated the Buffalo Sabres 3-2 in overtime.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Aaron Jones' mom wanted Vikings star benched over recent ball security issues
item.description: Minnesota Vikings running back Aaron Jones said his mom was not pleased with his performance in Sunday's win over the Arizona Cardinals.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Juan Soto could decide on his next team this weekend
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Juan Soto appears on a timetable to decide on where to sign either before or during baseball's winter meetings in Dallas, which start Sunday and run until Dec. 12.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah hires Jason Beck as offensive coordinator
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - While Kyle Whittingham's future is still undecided, another former BYU player is joining the Utes coaching staff. Former BYU quarterback Jason Beck is expected to be hired as Utah's new offensive coordinator, replacing Andy Ludwig, who resigned in October.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NHL to host free outdoor fan festival ahead of Winter Classic in Chicago
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The National Hockey League announced they will be hosting a free outdoor fan festival ahead of the Winter Classic in Chicago. The fan festival will begin at 10:30 a.m. on Tuesday, Dec. 31, in the Chicago Cubs parking lot at 1126 West Grace Street and run until 3:30 p.m. CT.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Kuithe, Fano earn All-Big 12 first team honors
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Despite missing the last three games of the season, Utes tight end Brant Kuithe was named to the All-Big 12 First Team on Wednesday. Kuithe joins Utes offensive lineman Spencer Fano as the only Utes to earn first team honors.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Nick Rimando elected to National Soccer Hall of Fame
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Former Real Salt Lake goalkeeper Nick Rimando has been elected to the National Soccer Hall of Fame. Rimando will be enshrined with the Class of 2025 on May 3, 2025 in Frisco, Texas.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Former Padres catcher Kyle Higashioka signs with Texas Rangers
item.description: Free agent catcher Kyle Higashioka and the Texas Rangers agreed Monday night on a $13.5 million, two-year contract that includes a mutual option for the 2027 season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Illinois Football assistant coach dies at age 62
item.description: CHAMPAIGN, Ill. (WCIA) -- Dana Dimel, the Senior Offensive Assistant for the Illinois Fighting Illini football team, has died. Illinois Athletics announced that the longtime coach passed away Tuesday at the age of 62. He is survived by his wife Julie and their children Winston and Joey.
item.dc:creator: Bradley Zimmerman, WGN 9

item.title: Rays' leadership, Pinellas commission at odds over new stadium
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays' future in St. Petersburg remains in doubt, as team leadership and Pinellas County commissioners are at odds over the plans for a new stadium.
item.dc:creator: Beth Rousseau, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Christian McCaffrey's season 'potentially' over after knee injury in 49ers' loss to Bills
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — San Francisco running back Christian McCaffrey suffered a knee injury that coach Kyle Shanahan described as “potentially” season-ending in the 49ers’ 35-10 loss to the Buffalo Bills on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Vikings win 5th straight, rallying past Cardinals 23-22 on Sam Darnold's TD pass with 1:13 left
item.description: Sam Darnold's second touchdown pass of the second half went to Jones for Minnesota's first lead with 1:13 remaining, and the Vikings rallied from 13 points down to beat the Arizona Cardinals 23-22 on Sunday for their fifth straight victory.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Atkins reaches 2,000 yards as USF Bulls fall at Rice
item.description: South Florida (6-6; 4-4 American) fell to Rice (4-8; 3-5 American), 35-28, Saturday as the Bulls closed out the regular season in the program’s first-ever game at Rice Stadium in Houston.
item.dc:creator: USF Football, WFLA, NBC
